Reference.Query: SELECT trade_id AS "TradeId", book AS "Book", desk AS "Desk", risk_factor AS "RiskFactor", asset_class AS "AssetClass", valuation_date::text AS "ValuationDate", delta AS "Delta", gamma AS "Gamma", vega AS "Vega", var_1d_99 AS "Var1D99", svar_1d_99 AS "SVaR1D99", pnl AS "Pnl" FROM nrt_reference_data WHERE valuation_date::text = @ValuationDate ORDER BY trade_id

Target.Query: SELECT trade_id AS "TradeId", book AS "Book", desk AS "Desk", risk_factor AS "RiskFactor", asset_class AS "AssetClass", valuation_date::text AS "ValuationDate", delta AS "Delta", gamma AS "Gamma", vega AS "Vega", var_1d_99 AS "Var1D99", svar_1d_99 AS "SVaR1D99", pnl AS "Pnl" FROM nrt_target_data WHERE valuation_date::text = @ValuationDate ORDER BY trade_id
